title: Surgeon Vacancy at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!
